violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The scoop used for dispensing ice at the bar ice well was observed to be in the ice with the handle not stored above the ice. Utensils used to dispense foods (ICE) must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The proper test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium tablet sanitizer solution were not available. (Facility had test strips for measuring bleach.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The bar beer cooler(s) were observed to have an accumulation of water/liquid in the base of the unit(s). Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil and/or residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
